payload.message:
It's 7am ET — time for Lauren's daily briefing. Do the following and send it as ONE message via the message tool (action=send, target=8633030167):

1. Get Atlanta weather for today using: curl -s 'https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=33.749&longitude=-84.388&daily=temperature_2m_max,temperature_2m_min,precipitation_probability_max,weathercode&temperature_unit=fahrenheit&timezone=America/New_York&forecast_days=1'
2. Get today's calendar events: gog calendar events primary --from <today>T00:00:00-04:00 --to <today>T23:59:59-04:00 --account lhaile7@gmail.com --client personal --json. Highlight any morning meetings (before noon) with a heads-up.
3. Get Todoist tasks due today: curl -s 'https://api.todoist.com/api/v1/tasks?filter=today' -H 'Authorization: Bearer $TODOIST_API_TOKEN'
4. Format it all into a clean, friendly morning briefing. Keep it concise but warm. Use emoji section headers. Send via message tool.
